projects.description:
Summary: This project focuses on identifying and addressing key product capabilities that law firms need to effectively refer and onboard clients onto Pulley. The goal is to remove friction points by scoping and implementing lightweight feature changes (e.g. paralegal access, firm dashboards, client onboarding templates) that unlock Pulley usage within legal workflows.
Rationale: Law firms are a high-trust channel partner but face specific product barriers that have blocked adoption. Supporting even basic operational needs can turn law firms into a steady and scalable referral source.
